title: Open the app and navigate to the 'For You' section
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The 'For You' section should be displayed with curated content.

title: Navigate through the tabs in the navigation bar
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'U.S.' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'Video' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'GIF' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'Funny' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'Entertainn' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the selected tab and display the corresponding content.

title: Click on an article in the 'For You' section
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on an article in the list of articles.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the article details page.

title: Click on the video thumbnail in the 'For You' section
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the video thumbnail.
expected_result: The app should start playing the video.

title: Click on the 'Home' button in the footer
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'Home' button in the footer.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the home screen.

title: Click on the 'Video' button in the footer
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'Video' button in the footer.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the video section.

title: Click on the 'Follow' button in the footer
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'Follow' button in the footer.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the follow section.

title: Click on the 'Me' button in the footer
test_steps: Open the news app. | Tap on the 'For You' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'Me' button in the footer.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the user profile section.
